description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, heavily adorned with colorful graffiti-style writing and symbols in neon green, purple, blue, red, and white. The slide and frame are covered in various phrases and tags, such as 'WHY', 'DO IT', 'FBI OPEN UP!', and '1337', giving it a rebellious, urban street-art aesthetic. The grip is ergonomically contoured and appears to be made of polymer, with a smooth surface and no visible checkering or stippling. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is standard length, flush with the slide, and does not feature any external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, lacking any extensions or flaring.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun covered in vibrant graffiti-style writing and symbols, featuring a smooth ergonomic grip and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: The muzzle end of the handgun is visible, showing the front sight and graffiti on the top of the slide.
description_view_1: The left side of the handgun displays the most graffiti, with colorful phrases and tags covering the slide and grip.
description_view_2: The rear of the handgun shows the back sight, the word 'DOPE' on the slide, and more graffiti on the top.
description_view_3: The right side of the handgun features additional graffiti, including 'DO IT' and 'FBI OPEN UP!' on the slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured with a gentle ergonomic curve, lacking visible checkering or stippling. It appears to be made of matte black polymer, providing a sleek and modern look. There are no finger grooves, logos, or embellishments visible, and the surface is uninterrupted except for the graffiti artwork. The grip is integrated seamlessly with the frame, offering a comfortable hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is conventional, with no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, maintaining a clean and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or special features are apparent on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide is covered in graffiti-style markings, including phrases such as 'WHY', 'DO IT', 'FBI OPEN UP!', '1337', and 'DOPE', rendered in various neon colors. These markings are scattered across the top and sides of the slide, with no traditional manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers visible. The style is bold, hand-drawn, and highly prominent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flaring, or finger rests. It maintains a minimalist design, blending seamlessly with the grip and lacking any visible logos or texturing.
